creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Make a difference this Ramadan! 

Did you know that you can hydrate, recycle and donate with @alainwaterofficial? Join the #GoodnessMovement this Ramadan! 

Here’s how you can do it:
💦Hydrate with Al Ain Water. Don’t throw away your empty water bottles!
♻️Recycle with RECAPP app! Request a free collection to earn points.
🎁 Donate your points to Al Jalila Foundation. 

I nominate @iamaseyat to participate in this amazing recycling and donation Movement! 

#Ad #AlAinWater

#ladyandhersweetescapes #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #dubai #DubaiReels

transcription.text: Join the goodness movement by Al Ain Water. Did you know that you can hydrate, recycle, and donate with Al Ain Water? Don't throw your empty water bottles. Recycle with Recap App. Request free collection and earn points. Donate your points to Al Jalila Foundation. Make a difference this Ramadan with Al Ain Water.
